CommunityApplications.Profile:
**NASearch** — a lightweight file search UI for your Unraid array.
Powered by `plocate`, it indexes your array and provides a fast, browser-based search interface with file previews (images, video, audio, PDF, text), inline download, folder zip, and optional HTTP Basic Auth.
No Elasticsearch. No Node. No build step. Just a single Docker container.
For support and bug reports, please open an issue on GitHub.
